hostname ROTEADOR-BORDA-SP
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 description UPLINK-SP
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0.1234
 description CLIENTE-X-TRANSITO
 encapsulation dot1Q 1234
 ip address 10.255.123.1 255.255.255.252
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0.5678
 description CLIENTE-Y-TRANSITO
 encapsulation dot1Q 5678
 ip address 10.255.124.1 255.255.255.252
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 no shutdown
!
interface Loopback0
 ip address 192.0.2.1 255.255.255.255
!
ip route 200.200.200.0 255.255.255.252 10.255.123.2
ip route 200.200.201.0 255.255.255.252 10.255.124.2
ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.0.1
ip route vrf CLIENTE-A 10.10.10.0 255.255.255.0 172.16.0.2
!
router bgp 65000
 bgp router-id 192.0.2.1
 neighbor 10.255.123.2 remote-as 64520
 neighbor 10.255.123.2 description CLIENTE-X
 neighbor 10.255.123.2 update-source Loopback0
 neighbor 10.255.123.2 password 7 030752180500
 neighbor 10.255.124.2 remote-as 64530
 neighbor 10.255.124.2 description CLIENTE-Y
 neighbor 10.255.124.2 update-source Loopback0
 !
 address-family ipv4
  network 200.200.200.0 mask 255.255.255.252
  network 200.200.201.0 mask 255.255.255.252
  neighbor 10.255.123.2 activate
  neighbor 10.255.123.2 route-map CLIENTE-IN in
  neighbor 10.255.123.2 route-map CLIENTE-OUT out
  neighbor 10.255.124.2 activate
  neighbor 10.255.124.2 route-map CLIENTE-Y-IN in
  neighbor 10.255.124.2 route-map CLIENTE-Y-OUT out
 exit-address-family
!
end
